data.summary: [Emergency Maintenance Notice] Emergency maintenance is on the way to resolve an issue. Maintenance
data.body:
[Emergency Maintenance Notice]
Emergency maintenance is on the way to resolve an issue.

Maintenance Period: 10/6 (Thu) 09:00 (UTC) ~ TBD
※Maintenance times may change based on conditions.

We apologize for the inconvenience caused.

10/6 (Thu) emergency maintenance has ended at 10:30 (UTC).

Compensation: Pyroxene*180, 120 AP
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101418

In-App Purchase price changes are fully applied.
Please refer following notice for the further details.
Notice: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101342
